_note: ⚠️ PROVISIONAL DRAFT CONTENT - Awaiting final wording. Editable without code changes.

jtbd.promptText: Build the Jobs-To-Be-Done statement from the root cause you uncovered in Peel the Onion

fields.name: when_situation
fields.label: When [situation]
fields.placeholder: The trigger or context from root cause
fields.hint: e.g., 'Our ops team manually re-keys 400 orders/week with 8% error rate'

fields.name: i_want
fields.label: I want to [motivation]
fields.hint: e.g., 'Automate data sync between our 3 systems'

fields.name: so_i_can
fields.label: So I can [outcome]
fields.hint: e.g., 'Redeploy 12 hours/week to strategic work and eliminate costly errors'

fields.name: functional_job
fields.label: Functional job
fields.hint: e.g., 'Reduce manual data entry time by 90%'

fields.name: emotional_job
fields.label: Emotional job
fields.hint: e.g., 'Feel confident our data is accurate'

fields.name: social_job
fields.label: Social job
fields.placeholder: How they want to be perceived
fields.hint: e.g., 'Be seen as driving efficiency gains'

example.when_situation: Our ops team manually re-keys 400 orders/week with 8% error rate
example.i_want: Automate data sync between our 3 systems
example.so_i_can: Redeploy 12 hours/week to strategic work and eliminate costly errors
example.functional_job: Reduce manual data entry time by 90%
example.emotional_job: Feel confident our data is accurate
example.social_job: Be seen as driving efficiency gains

questions.label: Identify
questions.question: Have you identified the right prospect at the right moment with a clear trigger event?
questions.hint: Not just any prospect — the RIGHT one, at the RIGHT time, with a documented trigger.

questions.label: Go Deep
questions.question: Have you researched their world deeply enough to earn the right to make contact?
questions.hint: 15 minutes of research before any outreach. Know their business, challenges, and context.

questions.label: Nurture
questions.question: Have you established a nurture sequence and built trust before asking for the sale?
questions.hint: Education before pitch. Value before ask. Trust before transaction.

questions.label: Iterate
questions.question: Have you iterated on your messaging based on their responses and feedback?
questions.hint: Not a script you repeat — a conversation you adapt based on what they tell you.

questions.label: Trigger
questions.question: Have you confirmed the trigger event is still active and creates urgency?
questions.hint: Triggers expire. Re-confirm the forcing event is still present and pressing.

questions.label: Escalate
questions.question: Have you escalated from initial contact to a diagnostic conversation with decision-makers?
questions.hint: Not stuck at initial contact — you've moved into a real diagnostic with people who can decide.
